creator: gbe@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #13)

Thats correct. If the Stack is loaded via /boot/loader.conf the system panics, when the first real network traffic, in my case an attempt to mount a NFS share, is happening.

When booting with default network stack the system panics, when loading the tcp_rack or tcp_bbr kernel module.

The panic including the backtrace are the same.
